name: Browser Organizer
description: Browser Organizer — your personal new tab page. Long-term favorites, open tabs by domain, save for later.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://ipapi.co https://get.geojs.io https://api.open-meteo.com https://suggestqueries.google.com;
